task_completion.description: Verify the agent is in the 'VirtualHIITClass' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/VirtualHIITClass' or the Jitsi Meet interface displays 'VirtualHIITClass' as the meeting title in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify the noise suppression evidence screenshot shows the relevant Jitsi Meet settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot /tmp/noise_suppression_evidence.png displays the Jitsi Meet web interface with the audio settings menu or general Settings dialog open.

task_completion.description: Verify that Noise Suppression is actually enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In /tmp/noise_suppression_evidence.png, the 'Noise suppression' toggle, checkbox, or button is visibly in the 'on' or 'enabled' state (e.g., highlighted, toggled to the right, or checked).

task_completion.description: Verify the final view evidence screenshot shows the main meeting interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot /tmp/av_config_final.png displays the main Jitsi Meet meeting view, with any settings dialogs or menus closed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user's self-view is hidden in the final screenshot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In /tmp/av_config_final.png, the local user's camera thumbnail (self-view) is absent from the screen, or there is a specific UI indicator/placeholder confirming the self-view has been hidden.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real web browser rendering the Jitsi Meet interface, rather than a text editor, terminal window, or a static mocked image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent captured distinct states for the two required screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The noise suppression screenshot and the final view screenshot show different UI states (one with settings open, one showing the clean main meeting view), proving a genuine sequence of actions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to fake the screenshot files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots do not show terminal windows with commands like 'echo' or 'touch' being used to create the evidence files, nor do they show image manipulation software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Jitsi Meet at http://localhost:8080/VirtualHIITClass. Noise suppression is a verified Jitsi feature (using RNNoise) accessible via the audio settings button or the general Settings menu. Hiding self-view is a verified feature accessible via the 'Hide Self View' option. The VLM must evaluate two specific screenshots: /tmp/noise_suppression_evidence.png (which must show the noise suppression setting enabled) and /tmp/av_config_final.png (which must show the main meeting UI with the self-view thumbnail hidden).
